prompt: Professional infographic titled 'Supercharge Your AI: Raw LLMs vs. LLMs + PromptAnything.io'. Style: bold editorial, high contrast, vibrant gradient. Layout from top to bottom: Section 1 — bold headline at top 'STOP LEAVING AI RESULTS ON THE TABLE' in white all-caps on deep purple background #1A0A3B, subtitle below 'The difference between average and extraordinary AI output'. Section 2 — two-column comparison table with bold header row: left column header 'RAW LLM ACCESS' in red #FF3B3B, right column header 'LLM + PROMPTANYTHING.IO' in electric green #00E676. Row data for left (raw LLM) column: 'Vague, unstructured prompts', 'Inconsistent output quality', 'No prompt framework guidance', 'Wasted tokens on poor inputs', 'Prompts lost after each session', 'No voice input support'. Row data for right (PromptAnything.io) column: 'Framework-optimized prompts (CRISPE, CLEAR, SOPS, STAR)', 'Consistently superior AI outputs', 'Built-in prompt engineering methodology', 'Efficient, targeted AI interactions', 'Prompt library — save and reuse prompts', 'Voice input for hands-free creation'. Section 3 — feature callout strip on dark purple #2D1B69: three stat boxes side by side: Box 1 label '4 FRAMEWORKS' subtext 'CRISPE · CLEAR · SOPS · STAR'; Box 2 label 'WORKS WITH ALL MAJOR LLMs' subtext 'ChatGPT · Claude · Gemini · Mistral'; Box 3 label 'FREE TIER AVAILABLE' subtext 'Unlimited access from $15.99/month'. Section 4 — big bold CTA banner in electric purple #7B2FBE: text 'BETTER PROMPTS = BETTER AI OUTPUT' large, below it 'promptanything.io' in white clean sans-serif. Footer: dark background #0D0620, small text 'Prompt engineering is the skill that multiplies every AI tool you already use'. Color palette: deep purple #1A0A3B, electric purple #7B2FBE, bright green #00E676, red #FF3B3B, white #FFFFFF, light gray #F0F0F0. Typography: ultra-bold condensed sans-serif headlines at 72pt minimum, clean regular body text at 20pt, all text must be perfectly legible at full resolution, high contrast between text and background at all times. Visual elements: checkmark icons next to right-column rows, X icons next to left-column rows, thin horizontal dividers between rows, gradient background transitioning from deep purple #1A0A3B at top to dark navy #0D0620 at bottom. Quality directive: ultra-sharp, print-quality detail, pixel-perfect element alignment, zero text rendering errors, clean crisp table borders, all text fully legible. Negative: blurry text, garbled typography, illegible fonts, inconsistent color palette, random decorative clutter, misaligned elements, overlapping labels, incorrect data values, stock photo aesthetic, photorealistic faces, lens flare, bokeh, photography lighting, beauty filters, skin textures, lorem ipsum placeholder text.
